question_title: What will be the value of "ICE BofA BB US High Yield Index Option-Adjusted Spread" on 2026-04-09?
summary: The ICE BofA BB US High Yield OAS currently stands at 1.99% (March 26), up from 1.57% in late January. Credit spreads have been widening gradually amid severe macro stress: US-Iran military tensions with an April 6 escalation deadline, oil above $100/bbl, Strait of Hormuz near-closure, Treasury yields surging to 4.44%, and the S&P 500 down 9% from highs. The forecast centers on ~2.04% (10 trading day horizon), reflecting continued gradual widening as the base case. The distribution is right-skewed to account for a ~20% probability of a major stress spike if Iran tensions escalate into military action (precedent: April 2025 tariff shock pushed BB OAS from 1.99 to 3.06 in 12 days, with April 9, 2025 value at 2.87). A 15% de-escalation scenario provides left-tail weight. Monte Carlo simulation across four scenarios produces a median of 2.04, P10 of 1.79, and P90 of 2.34.

factors.description: Current level at 1.99%, up from 1.57% in late January - clear upward trend of ~0.005/day over recent months
Severe geopolitical stress: US-Iran tensions with April 6 military action deadline, oil >$100/bbl, Strait of Hormuz near-closure, S&P down 9% from high
Treasury yields surging (10yr at 4.44%), bond sell-off across developed markets, market shifting from rate cut to rate hike expectations
High yield credit spreads already widening - HYG at 52-week lows, new issue concessions doubled in March, non-investment grade spreads widened ~60bps recently
Historical precedent: April 2025 tariff shock sent BB OAS from 1.99 to 3.06 in ~12 trading days, with Apr 9, 2025 value at 2.87. Similar shock could recur if Iran escalates
De-escalation possibility: Trump has repeatedly extended deadlines, ceasefire talks could resume, oil could drop significantly if tensions ease
Monte Carlo simulation median across scenario mixture: 2.04, with P10-P90 range of 1.79-2.34

reasoning:
**Forecast: ICE BofA BB US High Yield OAS on 2026-04-09**

| Percentile | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| P10 | 1.79% |
| P25 | 1.91% |
| P50 (median) | **2.04%** |
| P75 | 2.18% |
| P90 | 2.34% |
| P95 | 2.48% |

**Key drivers:**
- **Current trajectory**: Spreads have widened steadily from 1.57% (Jan) to 1.99% (Mar 26), with a daily drift of ~+0.005
- **Geopolitical tail risk**: The April 6 Iran military action deadline falls right before resolution, creating significant upside risk to spreads. In April 2025, a similar shock pushed this metric from 1.99 to 2.87 in 10 trading days
- **Macro stress**: Treasury yields surging, S&P 500 down 9%, HYG at 52-week lows, new issue concessions doubling
- **De-escalation offset**: 15% probability of significant de-escalation bringing spreads back to ~1.85

The distribution is modestly right-skewed, centered at 2.04% with the right tail extending toward 2.5-2.8% to reflect the Iran escalation scenario.
sources_consulted: [(Metaculus) What will be the value of "ICE BofA BB US High Yield Index Option-Adjusted Spread" on 2026-04-09?](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/42977)
resolution_criteria: Resolves to the value found on the FRED API for the series BAMLH0A1HYBB once the data is published.
fine_print:
A script will be used to determine the resolution of this question. It will paginate through the data found at the API endpoint `https://api.stlouisfed.org/fred/series/observations?series_id=BAMLH0A1HYBB`. This endpoint includes the latest data for the series. The latest revised data will be used when the resolution is assessed. The datapoint matching 2026-04-09 will be used to determine the resolution of this question.

A datapoint matches if:
1. The series is updated daily and the date of the datapoint is within 1 day previous to the resolution date.
2. The series is updated weekly and the date of the datapoint is within 7 days previous to the resolution date.
3. The series is updated monthly and the date of the datapoint is within 31 days previous to the resolution date.

If the datapoint is clearly skipped, or no datapoint is found after 2 weeks of checking then the question will be annulled.
